<!-- Keep PRs to one capability per change (see CONTRIBUTING.md). -->

## What

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link any ADR or guide. -->

## Proof

<!-- A change ships its proof. Check what applies: -->

- [ ] Manifests / values updated (declarative only; nothing applied imperatively)
- [ ] Versions/images pinned (chart versions, image `@sha256` digests, CRD versions; no `:latest`)
- [ ] ADR added/updated under `docs/public/decisions/` (if a decision was made)
- [ ] Guide added/updated under `docs/public/guides/` (if operational)
- [ ] Benchmark / smoke result attached (if serving or perf relevant)
- [ ] Pre-push checks pass locally (the jobs in `.github/workflows/ci.yml`; see AGENTS.md)

## Notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: trade-offs, follow-ups, out-of-scope items. -->
